title: Abundance Is Who I Am
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the last threads of reaching and allowing wealth to settle as permanent identity
excerpt: A short energy statement from the Day 84 theme of a 12-week money programme. The release names every remaining habit of striving or separation from abundance; the allow names the permanent, effortless state that is left when striving stops.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 84 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement from the Day 84 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 84: anchor abundance as who I am forever. The release names the habits of striving, scarcity, and separation; the allow names the permanent identity that remains when those habits are gone.
I am ready to release every trace of striving, scarcity, and separation from abundance. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow abundance as my permanent, effortless state of being. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 84 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
